description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in casual urban attire, featuring a short-sleeved t-shirt with a large graphic of a dog's face on the front. He is wearing fitted pants and low-top sneakers, giving him a relaxed, everyday appearance suitable for city environments. The figure has a well-groomed beard and short, neatly styled hair. His arms are relaxed at his sides, and his posture is upright and natural. The clothing fits closely to the body, and the shoes appear comfortable for walking. The overall look is modern and informal, ideal for a pedestrian in an urban setting.
description: A casually dressed adult male with a graphic t-shirt, fitted pants, and sneakers, standing upright with a relaxed posture.
description_view_0: Front view shows the graphic dog t-shirt, facial features, and full outfit details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, beard, and the fit of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, t-shirt, pants, and shoes, with arms at the sides.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and side details of the outfit.
